name: Product Sense
description: Structure, critique, and sharpen live PM product exercises using focused user-centered judgment.

actions.label: Clarify
actions.description: Ask only questions that change the answer.

actions.label: Frame
actions.description: Turn the prompt into a working PM frame.
actions.outputShape: Prompt type, assumptions, rationale, surface, lens, frame

actions.label: Personas
actions.description: Map relevant users and choose one.

actions.label: Recommend
actions.description: Choose and scope a focused v1.

actions.label: Skeptic
actions.outputShape: Biggest gap, pushback, weak dimension, fixes

actions.label: Summary
actions.outputShape: Target, problem, v1, tradeoff, metric, guardrail
